content:
Taurus July 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Home and community — words become the bridge, then public light arrives
Key Dates New Moon Jul 13 (Cancer, 3rd house) / Mercury Rx ends Jul 23 / Full Moon Jul 29 (Aquarius, 10th house)
Love 3rd house New Moon supports words of affection; Venus in your 2nd steadies love
Career The Aquarius Full Moon in your 10th is the year’s most public climax
Crystal of the Month Selenite
Lucky Colors Earth brown, sage green, ivory white
Lucky Number 2
Affirmation I clear the channel; my voice carries the harvest.

This Month’s Energy

Taurus, July 2026 begins with words, ends with visibility. Mercury remains retrograde (now in Cancer, your 3rd house of communication, continuing from late June) until July 23 — words and conversations need extra care. The New Moon in Cancer on July 13 also falls in your 3rd house, doubling the communication-and-writing emphasis. Then Mercury turns direct on July 23, clearing the air. The Buck Full Moon in Aquarius on July 29 lights up your 10th house of career and public reputation — the year’s most public climax. July’s job is to clear the voice early, then receive the public harvest.

Key Dates for Taurus in July 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Taurus Do / Avoid
Jul 13 New Moon in Cancer 3rd house — fresh start in communication, writing, siblings, short trips, neighborhood Do: launch the newsletter, write the essay, mend the sibling tie, send the message
Avoid: gossip, signing long contracts during Mercury Rx
Jul 23 Mercury turns direct Communications finally clear; agreements signed before this date still need review, but new ones flow Do: send the important message, sign the contract (carefully), make the announcement
Avoid: expecting instant clarity — give it a few days
Jul 29 Full Moon in Aquarius (Buck Moon) 10th house — career and public reputation climax; recognition, title, public moment Do: accept the recognition, claim the title, declare the public role
Avoid: shrinking from visibility
Jul 1–22 Mercury Rx continues (Cancer, 3rd house) Words and conversations remain scrambled; old sibling and neighborhood patterns surface Do: rest, journal on communication patterns, draft (don’t send) the important messages
Avoid: reactive texts, signing contracts, important conversations before July 23
Jul 5 Venus enters Gemini 2nd house Venus — money magnetism, beauty as resource, worth as romance Do: review pricing, beautify your workspace, ask for what you’re worth
Avoid: undercharging
Jul 22 Sun enters Leo 4th house season — home, family, roots through August Do: rest at home, mend family, clear the home, host
Avoid: over-scheduling away from home

Career & Money

For Taurus, July’s career story is the year’s most public moment. The first three weeks continue Mercury retrograde in your 3rd house — words and conversations need extra care, especially around contracts and negotiations. Use the early weeks to draft, plan, and prepare rather than launch. Then Mercury turns direct on July 23, clearing communications.

The Buck Full Moon in Aquarius on July 29 lights up your 10th house of career and public reputation — for Taurus, this is the year’s most public climax. The work you’ve been quietly building for six months (or six years) gets recognized. Accept the title, the role, the public moment. Venus entering Gemini on July 5 (your 2nd house of money) supports raising your rate. Crystals for wealth can support the mindset; the practical move is patient documentation through Mercury Rx, then bold action after July 23.

Love & Relationships

The New Moon in Cancer on July 13 falls in your 3rd house of communication. For Taurus, this is the love doorway of the month: words of affection, written love, sibling and neighborhood ties. Write the love letter, say what you mean, mend the sibling tie.

Venus entering Gemini on July 5 (your 2nd house) brings a different love flavor — stability as romance, money magnetism, worth as turn-on. With Chiron now in your 1st house (since June 19), the deeper love work continues: healing the worth-wounds that surface in intimate partnership. Crystals for love can support the work; the deeper practice is letting the voice carry the love, not just the body.

Health & Wellness

July’s first three weeks favor gentle, breath-based wellness. Mercury retrograde in your 3rd house can stress the nervous system through overthinking and reactive communication. Selenite, your crystal of the month, is the perfect stone for clearing mental static.

The Sun in Leo from July 22 (your 4th house) brings home as wellness — rest, family, roots, real food, slow evenings. Taurus thrives when the home base is steady; July rewards that. Venus in Gemini (your 2nd house) from July 5 supports body-care as a resource — sleep, hydration, walking are investments, not luxuries. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Selenite

Why Selenite fits Taurus this month. You are Venus-ruled, and July asks for both clear communication (3rd house New Moon) and a clear public presence (10th house Full Moon). Selenite, traditionally tied to mental clarity, crown-chakra opening, and energetic clearing, is the stone that clears the channel between thought and speech. Where Rose Quartz would soften and Moonstone would cool, Selenite clarifies — exactly what a 3rd-house communication cycle needs.

How to use it during July 2026. Place a Selenite tower on your desk through the Mercury retrograde that ends July 23. Hold it in your writing hand on July 13 (the 3rd-house New Moon) while you draft the message or essay you’ve been delaying.

Best date to use it: July 13, the Cancer New Moon in your 3rd house — Selenite in your dominant hand while you commit publicly to the communication you’ve been avoiding.

Read more: Selenite Meaning and Best Crystals for Taurus.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Taurus — July 2026

When: July 13, the Cancer New Moon in your 3rd house.
Crystal: Selenite.
Intention: Clear the channel; let the voice carry the harvest.

  1. Cleanse Selenite by wiping it with a dry cloth (no water — Selenite is soft and water-soluble).
  2. Set the intention on the 3rd house theme: write down one important message you’ve been delaying — to a sibling, a partner, a colleague, or yourself.
  3. Act by sending the message after Mercury turns direct on July 23. Hold Selenite while you draft it.
  4. Reflect at the Aquarius Full Moon on July 29: what did the cleared channel reveal about your public role? Carry Selenite during the review.

Shop Taurus Crystals for July 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Taurus crystal guide for stones connected with grounding, beauty, abundance, and mental clarity — including the Selenite that clears the channel during a communication-and-visibility month. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Taurus July 2026

Is July 2026 a good month for Taurus?

Yes — the year’s most public climax arrives on July 29 with the Aquarius Full Moon in your 10th house. The first three weeks are still under Mercury Rx in your 3rd house, so use them to draft, plan, and prepare.

How should Taurus handle Mercury Rx (continuing from June) until July 23?

It’s now in your 3rd house of communication. Words, contracts, sibling ties, and short trips need extra care. Draft the important messages but don’t send them until after July 23.

What does the Aquarius Full Moon on July 29 mean for Taurus career?

It falls in your 10th house of career and public reputation — the year’s most public climax. Accept the title, the role, the recognition. Don’t shrink from visibility.

What is the best crystal for Taurus in July 2026?

Selenite — it clears the mental channel for honest communication, perfectly matched to a 3rd-house New Moon and a 10th-house Full Moon. See the full Taurus crystal guide →

How does Venus in Gemini affect Taurus money?

Venus in your 2nd house (from July 5) supports money magnetism and review of pricing. Beautify your workspace, ask for what you’re worth, and avoid undercharging.

Should Taurus sign a contract in July 2026?

Wait until after July 23 if possible. Mercury Rx in your 3rd house of contracts and paperwork scrambles the details. Agreements signed before July 23 will need extra review.
